Argument Reference

The following arguments are supported:

  • display_name - (Required) (Updatable) The user-friendly name of the Process Automation instance.
  • compartment_id - (Required) The OCID of the compartment containing the OPA instance.
  • shape_name - (Required) The shape of the OPA instance.
  • description - (Optional) (Updatable) The description of the Process Automation instance.
  • consumption_model - (Optional) The entitlement used for billing purposes.
  • metering_type - (Optional) The metering type used for the OPA instance.
  • idcs_at - (Optional) The IDCS authentication token used for create-time provisioning in IDCS realms.
  • is_breakglass_enabled - (Optional) Whether breakglass access is enabled for the instance.
  • freeform_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Free-form tags applied to the instance.
  • defined_tags - (Optional) (Updatable) Defined tags applied to the instance.
